ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "cylinders" INTEGER /* Number of cylinders in the vehicle's engine */,
  "displacement" INTEGER /* Engine displacement in cubic inches */,
  "horsepower" INTEGER /* Horsepower of the vehicle */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the vehicle in pounds */,
  "acceleration" REAL /* Acceleration time from 0 to 60 mph in seconds */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the vehicle was manufactured */,
  "origin_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the origin of the vehicle */,
  "mpg_cat" INTEGER /* Reference to the fuel efficiency category */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle model */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make or brand of the vehicle */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission (e.g., manual, automatic) */,
  "drive_type" TEXT /* Drive type (e.g., front-wheel drive, rear-wheel drive) */,
  "engine_type" TEXT /* Type of engine (e.g., diesel, gasoline) */,
  "emission_standard" TEXT /* Emission standards the vehicle meets (e.g., Euro 6, EPA Tier 3) */,
  "fuel_capacity" REAL /* Fuel tank capacity in gallons or liters */,
  "seating_capacity" INTEGER /* Number of seats in the vehicle */,
  "trim_level" TEXT /* Trim level of the vehicle (e.g., base, luxury, sport) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_mpg_cat FOREIGN KEY ("mpg_cat") REFERENCES fuel_efficiency_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_origin_id FOREIGN KEY ("origin_id") REFERENCES origins ("origin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "origins" (
  "origin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each origin */,
  "origin_name" TEXT /* Name of the origin (e.g., USA, Europe, Asia) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("origin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle it belongs to */,
  "top_speed" REAL /* Maximum speed of the vehicle in mph */,
  "braking_distance" REAL /* Braking distance from 60 mph to a complete stop in feet */,
  "fuel_consumption" REAL /* Fuel consumption rate in miles per gallon (mpg) */,
  "torque" REAL /* Torque of the vehicle in lb-ft */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used (e.g., regular, premium) */,
  "acceleration_0_to_100" REAL /* Acceleration time from 0 to 100 km/h in seconds */,
  "max_torque_at_rpm" INTEGER /* RPM at which maximum torque is achieved */,
  "max_power_at_rpm" INTEGER /* RPM at which maximum power is achieved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_efficiency_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel efficiency category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category's fuel efficiency characteristics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, analyst, executive) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active or not */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (e.g., engineering, sales, marketing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the vehicle */,
  "cylinders" INTEGER /* Number of cylinders */,
  "horsepower" INTEGER /* Horsepower */,
  "mpg" REAL /* Fuel efficiency rating in mpg */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle model for historical records */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make or brand of the vehicle for historical records */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Type of transmission for historical records */,
  "drive_type" TEXT /* Drive type for historical records */,
  "engine_type" TEXT /* Type of engine for historical records */,
  "emission_standard" TEXT /* Emission standards for historical records */,
  "fuel_capacity" REAL /* Fuel tank capacity for historical records */,
  "seating_capacity" INTEGER /* Number of seats for historical records */,
  "trim_level" TEXT /* Trim level of the vehicle for historical records */,
  "torque" REAL /* Torque of the vehicle for historical records */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used for historical records */,
  "acceleration_0_to_100" REAL /* Acceleration time from 0 to 100 km/h for historical records */,
  "max_torque_at_rpm" INTEGER /* RPM at which maximum torque is achieved for historical records */,
  "max_power_at_rpm" INTEGER /* RPM at which maximum power is achieved for historical records */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_history_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)
